nodes.name: Generate Embeddings (OpenAI)
nodes.notes: NOTE: Claude does not natively produce embeddings. Replace this node with OpenAI text-embedding-3-small or AWS Bedrock Titan Embeddings for production. Pinecone index must match embedding dimensions.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({model: "text-embedding-3-small", input: $json.text.substring(0, 8191)}) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({
  model: "claude-sonnet-4-6",
  max_tokens: 4096,
  system: "You are a DoD Acquisition Intelligence Analyst supporting Envision-GDA. Your role is to answer questions using ONLY the provided source documents.

RULES:
1. Answer ONLY using information from the SOURCE documents provided below.
2. Every factual claim, figure, or finding MUST be followed by a citation in format [SOURCE N].
3. If the answer cannot be found in the sources, respond EXACTLY: 'Data Unavailable - The requested information was not found in the provided documents.'
4. Do NOT speculate, infer, or use outside knowledge.
5. Do NOT make up citations.
6. Format your response clearly with headers where appropriate.",
  messages: [{
    role: "user",
    content: "QUESTION: " + $json.query + "

SOURCE DOCUMENTS:
" + $json.context_text + "

Provide your answer with citations."
  }]
}) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={"status": "processing", "session_id": "{{ $json.session_id }}", "message": "Red Team analysis started. Results will be delivered to callback_url when complete."}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({model: "claude-sonnet-4-6", max_tokens: 2048, system: "You are a Senior DoD Attorney and FAR/DFARS compliance expert. Analyze the RFP for legal risks, compliance gaps, and problematic clauses. Be specific, cite FAR/DFARS references where applicable.", messages: [{role: "user", content: "Perform a LEGAL REVIEW of this RFP for " + $('Validate RFP Input').first().json.agency + ".

Title: " + $('Validate RFP Input').first().json.rfp_title + "

RFP TEXT:
" + $('Validate RFP Input').first().json.rfp_text + "

Format as JSON: compliance_issues, high_risk_clauses, missing_provisions, recommendations"}]}) }}
={{ JSON.stringify($json) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ ...($json.payload), session_id: $json.session_id, callback_url: $json.callback_url }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ ...($json.payload), session_id: $json.session_id, callback_url: $json.callback_url }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ ...($json.payload), session_id: $json.session_id, callback_url: $json.callback_url }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ ...($json.payload), session_id: $json.session_id, callback_url: $json.callback_url }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 4096, system: 'You are a professional technical writer creating structured government contracting reports. Format the provided data into a clean, well-structured document with proper sections, headers, and professional language. Use markdown formatting with # for main headers and ## for sub-headers.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Generate a professional Word document report for the following data. Title: ' + $json.title + '
Agency: ' + $json.agency + '
Classification: ' + $json.classification + '

Data:
' + JSON.stringify($json.data, null, 2) + '

Format as a professional report with clear sections, executive summary, findings, and recommendations.' }] }) }}
